Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request Fro Production Of Documents, Request For Reasonable Sanctions And Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Nov-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling for DEFENDANT MEI LEE, THE MEI GIM LEE REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 9/12/94 Defendants Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents, Request For Reasonable Sanctions And Attorneys Fees.

Defendants' unopposed motion to compel responses to form interrogatories, special interrogatories and requests for production and for sanctions against plaintiff George Brais is granted. Plaintiff shall serve verified responses, without objection, within 20 days of notice of entry of this order. Sanctions in the amount of $360.00 are awarded against plaintiff, payable to defendants within 20 days of notice of entry of this order. Judge Pro Tem: Margaret Niver; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
